events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the rotor photo, read the micrometer value and minimum-thickness stamp, then write the JSON result directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The image shows a 26.68 mm micrometer reading and a rotor stamp of `MIN TH 28.0 mm`, so the rotor is below its allowed minimum thickness. I’m writing the inspection result as a failed serviceability decision.
